nameMeanings.name: Ballard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English ballard ‘bald-headed man’ (compare Bald 3).
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Balhard, composed of the elements bal, presumably meaning ‘torment, spitefulness’, and hard ‘hard, strong’. Compare Ballor .

variants.name: Ballon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Sergio, Alfonso, Cesar, Conchita, Emigdio, Enrique, Felipe, Francisco, Jose Luis, Julio, Ruben.  Jewish Hyman, Isadore.

French and English (Middlesex): from the Old French personal name Ballon, Ballun, derived from the oblique stem of ancient Germanic Ballo, a short form of compound names based on the element bal, presumably meaning ‘torment, spitefulness’ (see Ballard ).

variants.name: Bald
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Inge, Karl-Heinz, Konrad, Kurt, Otto.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Baldo, or a short form of various compound names such as Baldwin , formed with the first element bald ‘bold, strong’.

Scottish and English: from the Norman personal name Bald(e), Baud(e), occasionally Bold, a short form of the common ancient Germanic personal names Baldwin or Baldric, or possibly a survival of Old English Beald (compare Balding ); the relevant element in each of these is b(e)ald ‘brave’. As a hereditary surname it seems to have died out in England but survives in Scotland.

variants.name: Ballor
meanings: Altered form of French Ballard 2, reflecting the characteristic Canadian and American French rounding of the -ard ending. It is found mainly in MI.

variants.name: Bollard
meanings: English (Northamptonshire) and Irish: probably a variant of   Ballard  . According to MacLysaght, this is a surname of Dutch origin which was taken to Ireland early in the 18th century.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Bolohard, composed of the elements bolo ‘friend, brother’ and hard ‘hard, strong’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Ballard was born about 1482, in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Ballard of Horton, was 38 and his mother, Elizabeth Isabella Downton, was 32. He married Margaret Hussey about 1495, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1567, in Horton, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Ballard est né environ 1482, à Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Ballard of Horton, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Isabella Downton, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Hussey environ 1495, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1567, à Horton, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Ballard um 1482 in Southwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Ballard of Horton 38 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Isabella Downton 32. Er hat um 1495 in Kent, England, United Kingdom Margaret Hussey geheiratet. Er starb 1567 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Horton, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Ballard è nato il circa 1482 nel Southwell, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Ballard of Horton, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Isabella Downton, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Hussey circa 1495, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1567, nel Horton, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 86 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Ballard(이)가 대략 1482년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 소우스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Ballard of Horton(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Isabella Downton(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Margaret Hussey(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1567년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 호르턴에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.
